goals.title: Reduce Orchestration Overhead
goals.description: Reduce orchestration overhead and token use for each task
goals.success_criteria: Single orchestration plane with minimal subprocess churn and reduced prompt token consumption
goals.verification_method: Build succeeds and prompt caching is active

goals.title: Stabilize Run Loop
goals.description: Stabilize run loop and self-healing to avoid false stalls and improve retries
goals.success_criteria: Heartbeat-based stall detection with dynamic thresholds prevents false positives
goals.verification_method: Run loop completes without false stall detections

goals.title: Unify State and Actions
goals.description: Improve determinism and recovery by unifying state and actions
goals.success_criteria: SQLite is canonical state store with typed action schemas for routing

goals.title: Safe Reviewable Code Changes
goals.description: Enforce safe, reviewable code changes via diffs scoped to the repo
goals.success_criteria: All code edits use deterministic diff/patch application within workspace_root
goals.verification_method: Git diff shows only scoped changes

goals.title: Soft-Fail Verification
goals.description: Maintain usability with soft-fail verification when builds/tests fail
goals.success_criteria: Build failures capture diagnostics and loop continues with smaller patches
goals.verification_method: Simulated build failure does not abort the run loop

stories.title: Codebase Study & Mapping
stories.description: As a developer, I want to understand the existing OpenExec architecture so that I can safely refactor the orchestration plane
acceptance_criteria: Current orchestration flow documented (Pipeline, Loop, DCP relationships)
State management patterns mapped (JSON vs SQLite usage)
Action routing heuristics identified
Stall detection logic documented

tasks.title: Chassis: Map Orchestration Architecture
tasks.description: Read and document the current Pipeline, Loop, and DCP implementations to understand control flow and state transitions
tasks.technical_strategy: Examine internal/pipeline/, internal/loop/, and internal/dcp/ directories. Document entry points, state transitions, and subprocess spawning patterns in .openexec/engram/architecture_map.md. Use safe_commit --story US-001 --task T-US-001-001 to persist findings.

stories.title: Collapse to Single Orchestration Plane
stories.description: As a developer, I want Pipeline/Loop to be the single orchestration core with DCP as a thin adapter so that subprocess churn is eliminated
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline/Loop is the single orchestration entry point
DCP refactored to thin local-tools adapter
No per-phase subprocess spawning
Build succeeds

tasks.title: Diagnose: Identify DCP Coupling Points
tasks.description: Analyze current DCP integration points and identify what must remain vs what can be inlined into Pipeline/Loop
tasks.technical_strategy: Grep for DCP imports and method calls across internal/. List functions that can be moved to Pipeline/Loop vs those that must stay as tool adapters. Document in .openexec/engram/dcp_coupling.md. Use safe_commit --story US-002 --task T-US-002-001.

tasks.title: Implement: Refactor DCP to Thin Adapter
tasks.description: Move orchestration logic from DCP into Pipeline/Loop, leaving DCP as a minimal tool interface
tasks.technical_strategy: Extract orchestration methods from DCP into internal/loop or internal/pipeline. Keep only file operations, shell execution, and diff application in DCP. Update imports across the codebase. Use safe_commit --story US-002 --task T-US-002-002.

tasks.title: Verify: Orchestration Plane Consolidation
tasks.description: Confirm single orchestration plane is active and DCP is reduced to tool adapter role
tasks.technical_strategy: Run go build and execute a minimal test run. Verify no subprocess spawning for phase transitions. Check DCP exports are limited to tool functions. Use safe_commit --story US-002 --task T-US-002-003.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./... && go test ./internal/loop/... -v || echo verify-soft-fail

stories.title: SQLite Canonical State
stories.description: As a developer, I want SQLite to be the single source of truth so that state drift between JSON and DB is eliminated
acceptance_criteria: All runtime state reads from SQLite
JSON artifacts are read-only exports or removed
Session and Audit tests pass

tasks.title: Chassis: Migrate State to SQLite-Only
tasks.description: Refactor state management to use SQLite as canonical store, converting JSON writes to optional exports
tasks.technical_strategy: Identify all JSON state writes in internal/state or similar. Replace with SQLite inserts/updates via existing audit.db schema. Add optional JSON export function for debugging. Ensure Session and Audit table schemas support all required state. Use safe_commit --story US-003 --task T-US-003-001.

stories.title: Typed Action Schemas
stories.description: As a developer, I want typed action schemas for routing and tool control so that text heuristics are eliminated
acceptance_criteria: Action types defined as Go structs with JSON tags
Router uses type assertions instead of string matching
Schema validation rejects malformed actions
stories.verification_script: echo '{"action":"noop"}' | jq '.' >/dev/null 2>&1 && go build ./... || echo schema-soft-fail

tasks.title: Diagnose: Catalog Current Text Heuristics
tasks.description: Identify all string-based action routing in the codebase
tasks.technical_strategy: Search for string comparisons in router/dispatcher code (strings.Contains, regex matches on action names). Document each heuristic and its intended action type in .openexec/engram/action_heuristics.md. Use safe_commit --story US-004 --task T-US-004-001.

tasks.title: Implement: Define Action Schema Types
tasks.description: Create Go struct types for each action with proper JSON serialization
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/actions/types.go with structs for each action (EditAction, RunAction, etc.). Implement ActionType interface with Validate() method. Add JSON schema generation for external validation. Use safe_commit --story US-004 --task T-US-004-002.

tasks.title: Implement: Refactor Router to Use Typed Actions
tasks.description: Replace string matching with type-based dispatch
tasks.technical_strategy: Update router to unmarshal JSON into specific action types. Use type switch for dispatch instead of string comparisons. Remove deprecated heuristic code. Use safe_commit --story US-004 --task T-US-004-003.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./... && go test ./internal/actions/... || echo verify-soft-fail

stories.title: Deterministic Diff/Patch Edits
stories.description: As a developer, I want code edits to use deterministic diff/patch application scoped to workspace_root so that changes are safe and reviewable
acceptance_criteria: All file edits go through patch application
Patches are scoped to workspace_root
Edits outside workspace_root are rejected
Git diff shows applied changes
stories.verification_script: git diff --quiet || echo patch-applied; test -d . && echo workspace-root-valid

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Scoped Patcher
tasks.description: Create or refactor patcher to apply diffs only within workspace_root with path validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/patcher/scoped.go with ApplyPatch(workspaceRoot, diff) that validates all paths are within root before applying. Use filepath.Rel to detect escape attempts. Reject patches targeting paths outside root with clear error. Use safe_commit --story US-005 --task T-US-005-001.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./internal/patcher/... && go test ./internal/patcher/... || echo patcher-soft-fail

stories.title: Prompt Cost Reduction and Heartbeat Stall Detection
stories.description: As a developer, I want reduced prompt costs via caching and heartbeat-based stall detection so that runs are cheaper and more reliable
acceptance_criteria: System/briefing blocks are cached between iterations
History windowing limits context tokens
Heartbeat-based stall detection with dynamic thresholds
No false stalls on long single-iteration work
stories.verification_script: openexec version >/dev/null 2>&1 || go build ./cmd/openexec && echo cli-ok

tasks.title: Implement: Prompt Block Caching
tasks.description: Cache static prompt blocks (system, briefing) to reduce token regeneration
tasks.technical_strategy: Add cache layer in internal/prompt/ that hashes static blocks and reuses them across iterations. Implement cache invalidation on config changes. Measure token reduction in debug logs. Use safe_commit --story US-006 --task T-US-006-001.

tasks.title: Implement: History Windowing
tasks.description: Limit conversation history to recent N exchanges to reduce context tokens
tasks.technical_strategy: Add WindowHistory(messages, maxTokens) in internal/prompt/ that truncates older messages while preserving system context. Configure max window via OPENEXEC_HISTORY_WINDOW_TOKENS. Use safe_commit --story US-006 --task T-US-006-002.

tasks.title: Implement: Heartbeat Stall Detection
tasks.description: Replace timeout-based stall detection with heartbeat mechanism and dynamic thresholds
tasks.technical_strategy: Add heartbeat emission in Loop iteration. Implement StallDetector in internal/loop/ that uses activity timestamps instead of wall-clock timeouts. Dynamic threshold adjusts based on task complexity hints. Use safe_commit --story US-006 --task T-US-006-003.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./internal/loop/... && go test ./internal/loop/... -run Stall || echo stall-soft-fail

stories.title: Soft-Fail Verification Policy
stories.description: As a developer, I want the loop to continue with smaller patches when builds fail so that progress is not blocked by transient failures
acceptance_criteria: Build failures capture diagnostics to SQLite
Loop checkpoints work and continues
Smaller patch strategy is attempted on failure
Run does not hard-fail on build errors
stories.verification_script: go build ./... || echo build-soft-fail; go test ./internal/loop/... -run SoftFail || echo test-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Soft-Fail Recovery
tasks.description: Add soft-fail handling to Loop that captures diagnostics, checkpoints, and retries with smaller changes
tasks.technical_strategy: Wrap verification step in internal/loop/ with soft-fail handler. On build/test failure: record diagnostics to audit.db, checkpoint current state, emit reduced-scope patch for retry. Add OPENEXEC_SOFT_FAIL_ENABLED config. Use safe_commit --story US-007 --task T-US-007-001.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./internal/loop/... && go test ./internal/loop/... || echo softfail-soft-fail

stories.title: Goal Validation
stories.description: As a developer, I want to validate that all refactoring goals are met so that the epic is complete
acceptance_criteria: openexec run executes end-to-end without manual plan/story import
Server /api/health reports resolved runner and DB status
Build failures trigger soft-fail recovery, not abort
All goals G-001 through G-005 are satisfied
stories.verification_script: go build ./... && go test ./internal/... || echo validation-soft-fail

tasks.title: Verify: End-to-End Run
tasks.description: Execute openexec run on this repo and verify all goals are met
tasks.technical_strategy: Build openexec binary. Run against this workspace with a minimal test task. Verify single orchestration plane, SQLite state, typed actions, scoped patches, and soft-fail all function. Document results in .openexec/engram/validation_report.md. Use safe_commit --story US-008 --task T-US-008-001.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./cmd/openexec && ./openexec version && echo validation-complete || echo validation-soft-fail
